results.title: U.S. support for Taiwan reaffirmed by members of Congress even after Trump called arms sales a ‘negotiating chip’ with China
results.description: A ship fires a weapon during drills east of Taiwan, in this screenshot from a video released by the Eastern Theatre Command of China’s People’s Liberation Army (PLA) on Dec. 29, 2025. results.title: Princess Eugenie ‘gives up' major King Charles honour amid new tension

results.title: Ethiopia Is Open for Business, and the Time to Act Is Now
results.description: For too long, Ethiopia has been discussed only in terms of crisis, risk, or untapped potential. Today’s Ethiopia is not simply waiting for opportunity—it is building it. The recent visit by senior Ethiopian officials to Washington, D.C. during the week of May 11, led by Foreign Minister Gedion Timothewos, showed that the country is serious [...]
